context_text: <B> so i went for a while to the dermatologist and then ah got him in um put i went ahead and switched him over and got him seen on base and the first thing that the doctor on base did / <A> okay / <B> he was like well let's take a scrape of this and see if it might be something fungal that can be cleared up and { he } / <A> [ uh-huh ] / <B> took a scrape which neither my pediatrician nor the dermatologist which you would think a dermatologist would do a { scrape } / <A> [ uh-huh ] / <B> and i w that just well i was like wow you know he really impressed me so we switched our whole family over to the same doctor and um that's on base you know and he got him referred off 'cause i had to go through and get a referral to get him to see a specialist { like that } / <A> [ yeah ]
